title: Thermal Imaging Object Detection
author: Heat Parker
Computer Vision Engineer
description: Detect objects in infrared imagery—but thermal camouflage defeats detection
content:
Thermal cameras enable object detection in darkness and through obscurants.

**Related Chronicles**: [The Thermal Blind Spot (2038)](/docs/articles/thermal-blind-spot-2038)
